Epic: Enhance User Account Management and Security
Story Title: As a new user, I want to easily create an account with a valid email address and password so that I can access the platform.
User Story: As a new user, I want to create an account with a valid email address and password, and receive a confirmation email, so that I can verify my account and access the platform.
Acceptance Criteria: Successful account creation with valid email address and password.; Confirmation email sent to the user's email address.; Error messages are displayed for invalid input fields.

Epic: Enhance User Account Management and Security
Story Title: As a user, I want to securely reset my password if I forget it so that I can regain access to my account.
User Story: As a user, I want to be able to reset my password if I forget it, and receive a secure email with instructions on how to reset it, so that I can regain access to my account.
Acceptance Criteria: Successful password reset with a valid email address.; Password reset email is sent to the user's email address.; Password reset process is user-friendly.

Epic: Improve User Experience and Content Delivery
Story Title: As a user, I want to see more relevant content based on my interests so that I can stay engaged with the platform.
User Story: As a user, I want to see more relevant content based on my interests, so that I can stay engaged with the platform and discover new things,
Acceptance Criteria: Recommendations are relevant to the user's interests.; User can easily adjust their preferences.

Epic: Improve User Experience and Content Delivery
Story Title: As a user, I want to easily find information about products and services so that I can make informed purchasing decisions.
User Story: As a user, I want to easily find information about products and services, so that I can make informed purchasing decisions,
Acceptance Criteria: Users can quickly find products using search or browsing.; Product listings are well-organized.
